title: Longer words and patterns
description: Build endurance with 5-7 letter words — the bulk of everyday writing
text: before today we shared every story under the wide blue sky and watched the river flow
tips: Five-letter words start to feel natural at this WPM
Don't fear long words — break them mentally into syllables

character_tips.anna: Long words are just sequences of short patterns. Trust your fingers.
character_tips.maxim: Endurance matters — typing a long word without errors is real progress.
character_tips.knopych: MEGA WORDS! 5-7 letters of pure power! 💪
character_tips.klavochka: Big words for a big champion! 🌟
